positive: Minimalist bohemian illustration featuring a majestic silhouette of a golden retriever wearing a floral wreath, set against a continuous pattern of stylized abstract mountain ranges and rolling hills. The style is highly detailed woodcut engraving combined with delicate linocut art. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, sage green, creamy ivory, and earthy terracotta. The composition should be centered, with the main subject in a clean, bold silhouette against the intricate pattern background. Use clean lines, high contrast, excellent separation between subject and background pattern. Studio lighting, vector quality, seamless repeat texture, designed for textile print.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, cartoon, photo, realistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts
